name: rtk
description: Local Codex wrapper for installing and maintaining Rust Token Killer.

interface.shortDescription: Install or uninstall Rust Token Killer for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Local Codex wrapper that installs, removes, and re-applies Rust Token Killer's global Codex integration consistently across machines while preserving RTK's upstream project links.
defaultPrompt: Use the rtk skill with mode install to install RTK for Codex on this machine.
Use the rtk skill with mode uninstall to remove RTK and clean up Codex integration files.
